# Audit Template

Use this template when auditing a module or feature area.

## Audit: [Module Name]

**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
**File(s) audited:** `src/pages/XxxPage.tsx`, `src/components/Xxx.tsx`
**Scope:** [What is being audited and why]

## Findings

### Minor (UX or display issue)

### Gaps (missing feature, not broken)
